name: DataConsumerPolicy
description: Policy for Data Consumer to perform operations on metadata entities

rules.name: DataConsumerPolicy-EditRule
rules.description: Allow some of the edit operations on a resource for everyone.

rules.name: DataConsumerPolicy-CreateTask-Rule
rules.description: Allow authenticated users to create Task entities (governance approvals, data-access requests, etc.) via the /v1/tasks API.

rules.name: DataConsumerPolicy-TaskRule
rules.description: Allow authenticated users to file and edit tasks (data access requests, suggestions, etc.) against any entity. Restrict this rule (e.g. with an isOwner condition) to limit who can file or edit tasks on which entities.
